# Hamees Momin Portfolio - Full AI Context

## Site Summary

Hamees Momin is a full-stack developer building polished, secure, high-performance websites and digital products. The portfolio highlights frontend engineering, backend engineering, product delivery, responsive interface work, secure contact handling, and real estate or wealth-related projects.

## Services And Capabilities

- Frontend engineering: React interfaces, responsive layouts, accessibility, performance-minded CSS, visual polish, and reusable UI structure.
- Backend engineering: Node.js APIs, validation, secure contact flows, deployment structure, and maintainable server logic.
- Product delivery: User-flow clarity, SEO basics, launch readiness, content structure, and business-focused digital products.

## Featured Work

- Skywing Real Estate: A real estate platform focused on property discovery, lead generation, premium presentation, and user confidence.
- Purewealth: A wealth-oriented digital experience focused on clarity, credibility, and performance.
- Varaa Realty: A real estate website focused on brand trust, structured service presentation, and direct contact flows.

## Contact Details

- Primary email: hamu.dxb@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +971502877142

## Technical Notes

The site is a React/Vite frontend with a Node server fallback. It uses local assets, strict security headers, responsive image formats, SEO metadata, a sitemap, robots.txt, and advisory llms.txt files.
